def positive_command_or_task_mutates_shared_process_state_directly():
    rule_id = "command_or_task_mutates_shared_process_state_directly"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag command handlers or task functions that directly rewrite module-level caches or registries used elsewhere."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
